edges.detail: External communication edge is always part of global order.
External communication edge is always part of global order.

reason: Every program-order edge in the cycle is a preserved (ppo) edge, so ppo u comm is cyclic; RVWMO forbids it. (PBMT=NC is non-cacheable main memory and obeys RVWMO per Svpbmt, so this verdict equals the cacheable twin; the plain body lets herd7 cross-check it.) (herd7 not on PATH; no cross-check performed.)
